item.title: 這些東西先別買！2023年蛙家幫你踩的雷有這些！斜取式收納箱、食物保鮮托盤、螺旋曬衣架看起來都很好用，但真的都不推～｜勸世系列｜蛙家
item.itunes:title: 這些東西先別買！2023年蛙家幫你踩的雷有這些！斜取式收納箱、食物保鮮托盤、螺旋曬衣架看起來都很好用，但真的都不推～｜勸世系列｜蛙家
item.itunes:author: 蛙家Waja
item.itunes:summary:
In 2023,. Wroga has actually tested a lot of products for frog fans. and has protected the wallets of many fans with weak brainwaves. Today, let us take a look at. which 9 of the many products Froga has tested. are the least worth buying. Friends who haven’t subscribed. before going down,. remember to subscribe first. and turn on the little bell. The first thing is this. slant-type storage box. This kind of storage box is the first one that many people think is difficult to use. The. slant-type design and the lid are dust-proof. At first glance, It seems very convenient to take off. , but everyone knows that this design. turns the storage box directly into a bottomless pit. The. slanted and deep opening design. makes it difficult to reach the bottom when taking out items. Some small items. may be difficult to turn over. if they are put in , but this kind of box usually does. It is also very difficult to move when stacked. If. the items are larger,. they may get stuck. and need to be pulled hard to take them out. Some frog fans may ask. , what should you do. if you need to stack them and want easy access? You can choose this kind of side-opening storage box. It is. flat and has no slope problem. It can be stacked. , but you can see the items in the box at a glance. It is also very convenient to take. Some side-opening storage boxes have folding models. that are small when not in use. A small piece. is very good for storage. Although this kind of storage box is stackable. , some materials are soft. and will dent when pressed. It is not so easy to bear weight. Pay special attention when purchasing. If you are still not satisfied with the side-opening storage box,.

you can also try this. drawer. The storage box. is also stackable and can. be pulled out. from the side drawer. It is very convenient to take or put. The second one is a DIY combination shoe box. with Shopee for 15 yuan each. I believe many people should have bought it. and bought it. After I got home, I regretted spending so much money. This shoe box was advertised. as being as easy to assemble as a cardboard box,. but in actual operation, I found that was not the case. It was difficult to align the tenons and it. took a while. I just successfully assembled it. , and after assembling it, take a closer look at. the box. It’s too soft. It’s. not stiff at all. . I put the shoes in and stacked. them up . Oh my god, the shoe box is so crooked. that it can fall over at any time. . It’s really frustrating. But. Don’t worry. You. can still use it to store these things. This storage box is heavy-duty and easy to deform. It is suitable for storing lighter items such as tea bags and brewed coffee . Items that are light and easy to scatter. are also suitable. It can be used to store masks or some medical supplies. and placed in the entrance for easy access. As long as it is not used as a shoe box,. it can be put to good use. The third one is a food preservation tray that looks very powerful. This design has been used in the past. The sealing of stored silver jewelry. prevents it from. contacting the air,. which can slow down oxidation. The same concept can be applied to food. to extend the shelf life. The tray is flat. and can be stacked after use. It seems super convenient.

, but in actual use,. it is not so consistent at all. What's going on? We put in a small amount of clams. but the lid couldn't be closed. We originally wanted to try to see if we could use the reverse lid to see. if it worked. It turned. out that the amount of clams that this preservation tray can hold is a bit small. If. it doesn't work,. let's try it with chicken wings and vegetables. The. chicken wings can barely cover. the vegetables. If they are scattered all around,. the lid will not close. . You have to concentrate the vegetables in the middle. But this amount is only two or three bites. , which is not enough. Let’s stack them. again to see if. the plates are not stable and will wobble. Akira’s. summary: This plastic wrap tray. can’t be covered. if there are too many things. Although it can be stacked. , it is very unstable and prone to collapse. The plastic wrap in the middle. is really only a thin piece. If it is wrapped with sharp objects such as bones,. it may be punctured. It turns out that this tray can only be used as a food preparation tray, which. is really surprising. The fourth one is this. hand-pressed garlic cutter. I believe many people have seen this advertisement. and can cut minced garlic by taking a photo. However, the actual experience after using it. is absolutely superb. I don’t recommend. it. This is really a thing that is not only useless. but also a waste of time. The knife used for mincing is a stainless steel piece,. not a knife. , which reduces the worry of scratches. The partition in the middle of the knife mold is super easy to fall off. in actual use. Look at me, pat, pat, pat, pat. , huh? Why are the garlic cloves getting less and less. when I open the lid and see that.

they are all stuck on the knife mold and I. have to use chopsticks to pick them out for a long time? It really pissed me. off . Later, some netizens said that we used it wrong. , so we followed the netizen's suggestion. and installed the partitions in reverse. , but it was completely If it gets stuck,. it will fall out. if you are not careful. Actually, try patting the garlic again. Last time, netizens said that we patted too slowly and with too little. force. Listen, this time we tried our best to pat the garlic quickly and hard,. but the garlic was patted more and more. The less. I come to open it and take a look,. the garlic is still stuck on the mold. The only praiseworthy thing. is that the reverse plate. prevents us from using chopsticks to pick out the garlic for a long time. If your purpose is to mince the garlic, it is. still recommended. If you want to buy other garlic cutters,. don’t waste your money on this difficult-to-use and labor-intensive product. The fifth item is the vegetable curler. This seems to be a very simple thing . It is said that it can cut vegetables into spirals. It seems interesting. , but this is Is it really easy to cut. the cucumber made of plastic. ? First try it with a small cucumber. First cut one end flat. , rotate the core in the middle and insert it into the small cucumber. After it is fixed, you can start to rotate it. around and really start slicing. It ’s so cool. We continued to spin. and really cut it into spiral shapes. The finished product looked like springs. It was super cute. Next, we tried small potatoes. to see if they could turn into the kind of rotating potatoes sold at night markets. When we started to spin,. the potato slices broke immediately. It even spins idling. If you want to cut the potato,. you have to press the blade with your hand to cut. But this is not only difficult to cut. , but also may accidentally cut your hand.

In the end, the editors agreed that. this thing is an interesting little toy,. some are softer and. not easy to cut. Such wide food. should be able to be successfully cut into spirals. The price is not expensive. People with fresh pictures can buy it and play with it. , but usually they should be put away after playing with it once. . After all , there is no point. in cutting food into spirals. . Sixth They are all kitchen supplies,. shrimp peelers. This thing has been touted in Facebook ads and Shopee. It is so amazing. Now it has even released version 2.0. and is directly made of stainless steel. It is no longer a plastic product. If you love to eat shrimp. but hate peeling it, People who like shrimp shells. should be careful not to buy this thing. The first thing I want to complain about. is that when using this product,. you must also encounter the important point of the shrimp. First, peel off the shrimp head. and insert the long clip into the shrimp shell and shrimp. middle of meat. The raw shrimps are a bit soft and difficult. to insert and it takes a while to align. , and because of the thickness of the clip,. it is impossible to insert them all the way. Although the meat and shell are separated after pressing,. there is no way to completely separate them. You have to repeat the action twice to really peel them off. Moreover, the peeled shrimp meat was a bit rotten and. my appetite was reduced by half. I tried it with mature shrimp. because the meat is harder. and more difficult to handle. The shrimp meat was also rotten when inserted. It was really ugly . It also. smelled like shrimp on my hands. It was worse. Peeling shrimps by hand. is more convenient, fast and beautiful. I really advise you not to buy this kind of product randomly. The seventh item: Non-stick snacks.

The product with the most. lazy tongs looks a bit like a child. When learning. how to use chopsticks, use your fingers like this. It’s different from how. I usually hold chopsticks. . I fastened it on the ring and used my fingers to pick up the biscuits. When I. actually picked up the biscuits, I saw. that it was quite smooth at first. , but later I found that the tongs would become crooked. If. it crooked, I couldn’t pick up the biscuits. . And if It’s actually very difficult to pick it up accurately. without looking at the clip. , so you lose the point of eating snacks while watching dramas. Also,. when you’re about to finish the biscuits,. you have to put your hand into the bag. and you’ll hit the oil stains in the bag. It feels like using this The clip is a bit redundant. Change the angle. If you want to. enjoy eating snacks and sucking. your fingers,. don’t buy it blindly. It is versatile. . I believe many people have bought this hanger. It. can be hung horizontally. or rotated straight, which. can save a lot of money in the wardrobe. Let’s see how the space. is actually used. When. the clothes are hung horizontally, they immediately become unbalanced and. sway left and right. It’s not OK at all. Let’s try to hang the clothes. and try to hang them straight like the advertisement to save space. Although it is 80% similar , we only know. this after actually using it. The hanging method makes it easy for clothes to be squeezed with other items. Not only is it difficult to access. the cabinet , it cannot be used properly. if it is not high enough. Moreover,. most of the clothes you want to hang are coats or shirts and other. clothes that you do not want to squeeze. If you use this It might be suitable to. hang children's clothes or pet clothes. This iron ring that looks like mosquito coils. is actually a clothes drying rack.

Look at the photo. . Putting the quilt in like this to dry. can save a lot of space. Let's try it first. . Just put the big towel in a spiral shape. People are a bit impatient,. let alone drying sheets or thick cotton quilts. The washed sheets are relatively heavy. and put on the clothes drying rack. The whole thing is crooked. and seems to fall off at any time. . And if the weather is bad, the. middle part will If you don't dry it completely,. the accumulated moisture. will make the quilt smell musty. It is very troublesome to wash it again. It is recommended to use it to dry smaller cloth products such as towels. or to use it with clips. to dry small clothes such as socks and handkerchiefs. OK. , but if you want to buy sheets to dry,. please cancel the order quickly. and don't waste money. Finally. , I will teach you a super simple way to dry sheets. Take. out the ordinary clothes hanger you have at home. , grab one side of the sheet, pass it. through the middle of the clothes hanger and put it. on the clothes hanger. There is no need to use clips on it. , just put it on like drying clothes. Spread the sheets on both sides and. spread them over a large area to dry quickly. This is a secret trick taught by the laundry owner. Why not learn it quickly? Today I have summarized the 9 most likely things for you. Are there any products. that you are attracted to buy but are really amazing. that you have already bought. next year? Wroga will still help you check. the practical use. of the products. If you have products you want to know about,. please leave a message and let us know. If you like today's sharing,. please click "Super thank you" below. Support us with actions to make more practical videos. If you have any incurable diseases,.

please leave a message or send a private message. to follow IG to see the secrets. Join the community and there are various experts to help you. Finally, remember to like, subscribe and turn on the small bell. to lock the frog. Home updates every Wednesday. to bring you a piece of high-quality content that makes life better.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AVL5AN7p9dw

📍More Videos

Home Makeover \u0026 Diy Storage Ideas ｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYTeng

Unboxing \u0026 Review｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYTeng

-------- About us --------

YouTube channel：https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYTeng

Facebook group [ Group Buying ]：https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYTeng

Facebook group [ Storage Ideas ]：https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYTeng

Facebook group [ DIY ]：https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYTeng

Facebook fan page：https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYTeng
item.description:
In 2023,. Wroga has actually tested a lot of products for frog fans. and has protected the wallets of many fans with weak brainwaves. Today, let us take a look at. which 9 of the many products Froga has tested. are the least worth buying. Friends who haven’t subscribed. before going down,. remember to subscribe first. and turn on the little bell. The first thing is this. slant-type storage box. This kind of storage box is the first one that many people think is difficult to use. The. slant-type design and the lid are dust-proof. At first glance, It seems very convenient to take off. , but everyone knows that this design. turns the storage box directly into a bottomless pit. The. slanted and deep opening design. makes it difficult to reach the bottom when taking out items. Some small items. may be difficult to turn over. if they are put in , but this kind of box usually does. It is also very difficult to move when stacked. If. the items are larger,. they may get stuck. and need to be pulled hard to take them out. Some frog fans may ask. , what should you do. if you need to stack them and want easy access? You can choose this kind of side-opening storage box. It is. flat and has no slope problem. It can be stacked. , but you can see the items in the box at a glance. It is also very convenient to take. Some side-opening storage boxes have folding models. that are small when not in use. A small piece. is very good for storage. Although this kind of storage box is stackable. , some materials are soft. and will dent when pressed. It is not so easy to bear weight. Pay special attention when purchasing. If you are still not satisfied with the side-opening storage box,.

you can also try this. drawer. The storage box. is also stackable and can. be pulled out. from the side drawer. It is very convenient to take or put. The second one is a DIY combination shoe box. with Shopee for 15 yuan each. I believe many people should have bought it. and bought it. After I got home, I regretted spending so much money. This shoe box was advertised. as being as easy to assemble as a cardboard box,. but in actual operation, I found that was not the case. It was difficult to align the tenons and it. took a while. I just successfully assembled it. , and after assembling it, take a closer look at. the box. It’s too soft. It’s. not stiff at all. . I put the shoes in and stacked. them up . Oh my god, the shoe box is so crooked. that it can fall over at any time. . It’s really frustrating. But. Don’t worry. You. can still use it to store these things. This storage box is heavy-duty and easy to deform. It is suitable for storing lighter items such as tea bags and brewed coffee . Items that are light and easy to scatter. are also suitable. It can be used to store masks or some medical supplies. and placed in the entrance for easy access. As long as it is not used as a shoe box,. it can be put to good use. The third one is a food preservation tray that looks very powerful. This design has been used in the past. The sealing of stored silver jewelry. prevents it from. contacting the air,. which can slow down oxidation. The same concept can be applied to food. to extend the shelf life. The tray is flat. and can be stacked after use. It seems super convenient.

, but in actual use,. it is not so consistent at all. What's going on? We put in a small amount of clams. but the lid couldn't be closed. We originally wanted to try to see if we could use the reverse lid to see. if it worked. It turned. out that the amount of clams that this preservation tray can hold is a bit small. If. it doesn't work,. let's try it with chicken wings and vegetables. The. chicken wings can barely cover. the vegetables. If they are scattered all around,. the lid will not close. . You have to concentrate the vegetables in the middle. But this amount is only two or three bites. , which is not enough. Let’s stack them. again to see if. the plates are not stable and will wobble. Akira’s. summary: This plastic wrap tray. can’t be covered. if there are too many things. Although it can be stacked. , it is very unstable and prone to collapse. The plastic wrap in the middle. is really only a thin piece. If it is wrapped with sharp objects such as bones,. it may be punctured. It turns out that this tray can only be used as a food preparation tray, which. is really surprising. The fourth one is this. hand-pressed garlic cutter. I believe many people have seen this advertisement. and can cut minced garlic by taking a photo. However, the actual experience after using it. is absolutely superb. I don’t recommend. it. This is really a thing that is not only useless. but also a waste of time. The knife used for mincing is a stainless steel piece,. not a knife. , which reduces the worry of scratches. The partition in the middle of the knife mold is super easy to fall off. in actual use. Look at me, pat, pat, pat, pat. , huh? Why are the garlic cloves getting less and less. when I open the lid and see that.

they are all stuck on the knife mold and I. have to use chopsticks to pick them out for a long time? It really pissed me. off . Later, some netizens said that we used it wrong. , so we followed the netizen's suggestion. and installed the partitions in reverse. , but it was completely If it gets stuck,. it will fall out. if you are not careful. Actually, try patting the garlic again. Last time, netizens said that we patted too slowly and with too little. force. Listen, this time we tried our best to pat the garlic quickly and hard,. but the garlic was patted more and more. The less. I come to open it and take a look,. the garlic is still stuck on the mold. The only praiseworthy thing. is that the reverse plate. prevents us from using chopsticks to pick out the garlic for a long time. If your purpose is to mince the garlic, it is. still recommended. If you want to buy other garlic cutters,. don’t waste your money on this difficult-to-use and labor-intensive product. The fifth item is the vegetable curler. This seems to be a very simple thing . It is said that it can cut vegetables into spirals. It seems interesting. , but this is Is it really easy to cut. the cucumber made of plastic. ? First try it with a small cucumber. First cut one end flat. , rotate the core in the middle and insert it into the small cucumber. After it is fixed, you can start to rotate it. around and really start slicing. It ’s so cool. We continued to spin. and really cut it into spiral shapes. The finished product looked like springs. It was super cute. Next, we tried small potatoes. to see if they could turn into the kind of rotating potatoes sold at night markets. When we started to spin,. the potato slices broke immediately. It even spins idling. If you want to cut the potato,. you have to press the blade with your hand to cut. But this is not only difficult to cut. , but also may accidentally cut your hand.

In the end, the editors agreed that. this thing is an interesting little toy,. some are softer and. not easy to cut. Such wide food. should be able to be successfully cut into spirals. The price is not expensive. People with fresh pictures can buy it and play with it. , but usually they should be put away after playing with it once. . After all , there is no point. in cutting food into spirals. . Sixth They are all kitchen supplies,. shrimp peelers. This thing has been touted in Facebook ads and Shopee. It is so amazing. Now it has even released version 2.0. and is directly made of stainless steel. It is no longer a plastic product. If you love to eat shrimp. but hate peeling it, People who like shrimp shells. should be careful not to buy this thing. The first thing I want to complain about. is that when using this product,. you must also encounter the important point of the shrimp. First, peel off the shrimp head. and insert the long clip into the shrimp shell and shrimp. middle of meat. The raw shrimps are a bit soft and difficult. to insert and it takes a while to align. , and because of the thickness of the clip,. it is impossible to insert them all the way. Although the meat and shell are separated after pressing,. there is no way to completely separate them. You have to repeat the action twice to really peel them off. Moreover, the peeled shrimp meat was a bit rotten and. my appetite was reduced by half. I tried it with mature shrimp. because the meat is harder. and more difficult to handle. The shrimp meat was also rotten when inserted. It was really ugly . It also. smelled like shrimp on my hands. It was worse. Peeling shrimps by hand. is more convenient, fast and beautiful. I really advise you not to buy this kind of product randomly. The seventh item: Non-stick snacks.

The product with the most. lazy tongs looks a bit like a child. When learning. how to use chopsticks, use your fingers like this. It’s different from how. I usually hold chopsticks. . I fastened it on the ring and used my fingers to pick up the biscuits. When I. actually picked up the biscuits, I saw. that it was quite smooth at first. , but later I found that the tongs would become crooked. If. it crooked, I couldn’t pick up the biscuits. . And if It’s actually very difficult to pick it up accurately. without looking at the clip. , so you lose the point of eating snacks while watching dramas. Also,. when you’re about to finish the biscuits,. you have to put your hand into the bag. and you’ll hit the oil stains in the bag. It feels like using this The clip is a bit redundant. Change the angle. If you want to. enjoy eating snacks and sucking. your fingers,. don’t buy it blindly. It is versatile. . I believe many people have bought this hanger. It. can be hung horizontally. or rotated straight, which. can save a lot of money in the wardrobe. Let’s see how the space. is actually used. When. the clothes are hung horizontally, they immediately become unbalanced and. sway left and right. It’s not OK at all. Let’s try to hang the clothes. and try to hang them straight like the advertisement to save space. Although it is 80% similar , we only know. this after actually using it. The hanging method makes it easy for clothes to be squeezed with other items. Not only is it difficult to access. the cabinet , it cannot be used properly. if it is not high enough. Moreover,. most of the clothes you want to hang are coats or shirts and other. clothes that you do not want to squeeze. If you use this It might be suitable to. hang children's clothes or pet clothes. This iron ring that looks like mosquito coils. is actually a clothes drying rack.

Look at the photo. . Putting the quilt in like this to dry. can save a lot of space. Let's try it first. . Just put the big towel in a spiral shape. People are a bit impatient,. let alone drying sheets or thick cotton quilts. The washed sheets are relatively heavy. and put on the clothes drying rack. The whole thing is crooked. and seems to fall off at any time. . And if the weather is bad, the. middle part will If you don't dry it completely,. the accumulated moisture. will make the quilt smell musty. It is very troublesome to wash it again. It is recommended to use it to dry smaller cloth products such as towels. or to use it with clips. to dry small clothes such as socks and handkerchiefs. OK. , but if you want to buy sheets to dry,. please cancel the order quickly. and don't waste money. Finally. , I will teach you a super simple way to dry sheets. Take. out the ordinary clothes hanger you have at home. , grab one side of the sheet, pass it. through the middle of the clothes hanger and put it. on the clothes hanger. There is no need to use clips on it. , just put it on like drying clothes. Spread the sheets on both sides and. spread them over a large area to dry quickly. This is a secret trick taught by the laundry owner. Why not learn it quickly? Today I have summarized the 9 most likely things for you. Are there any products. that you are attracted to buy but are really amazing. that you have already bought. next year? Wroga will still help you check. the practical use. of the products. If you have products you want to know about,. please leave a message and let us know. If you like today's sharing,. please click "Super thank you" below. Support us with actions to make more practical videos. If you have any incurable diseases,.

please leave a message or send a private message. to follow IG to see the secrets. Join the community and there are various experts to help you. Finally, remember to like, subscribe and turn on the small bell. to lock the frog. Home updates every Wednesday. to bring you a piece of high-quality content that makes life better.

item.content:encoded:
In 2023,. Wroga has actually tested a lot of products for frog fans. and has protected the wallets of many fans with weak brainwaves. Today, let us take a look at. which 9 of the many products Froga has tested. are the least worth buying. Friends who haven’t subscribed. before going down,. remember to subscribe first. and turn on the little bell. The first thing is this. slant-type storage box. This kind of storage box is the first one that many people think is difficult to use. The. slant-type design and the lid are dust-proof. At first glance, It seems very convenient to take off. , but everyone knows that this design. turns the storage box directly into a bottomless pit. The. slanted and deep opening design. makes it difficult to reach the bottom when taking out items. Some small items. may be difficult to turn over. if they are put in , but this kind of box usually does. It is also very difficult to move when stacked. If. the items are larger,. they may get stuck. and need to be pulled hard to take them out. Some frog fans may ask. , what should you do. if you need to stack them and want easy access? You can choose this kind of side-opening storage box. It is. flat and has no slope problem. It can be stacked. , but you can see the items in the box at a glance. It is also very convenient to take. Some side-opening storage boxes have folding models. that are small when not in use. A small piece. is very good for storage. Although this kind of storage box is stackable. , some materials are soft. and will dent when pressed. It is not so easy to bear weight. Pay special attention when purchasing. If you are still not satisfied with the side-opening storage box,.

you can also try this. drawer. The storage box. is also stackable and can. be pulled out. from the side drawer. It is very convenient to take or put. The second one is a DIY combination shoe box. with Shopee for 15 yuan each. I believe many people should have bought it. and bought it. After I got home, I regretted spending so much money. This shoe box was advertised. as being as easy to assemble as a cardboard box,. but in actual operation, I found that was not the case. It was difficult to align the tenons and it. took a while. I just successfully assembled it. , and after assembling it, take a closer look at. the box. It’s too soft. It’s. not stiff at all. . I put the shoes in and stacked. them up . Oh my god, the shoe box is so crooked. that it can fall over at any time. . It’s really frustrating. But. Don’t worry. You. can still use it to store these things. This storage box is heavy-duty and easy to deform. It is suitable for storing lighter items such as tea bags and brewed coffee . Items that are light and easy to scatter. are also suitable. It can be used to store masks or some medical supplies. and placed in the entrance for easy access. As long as it is not used as a shoe box,. it can be put to good use. The third one is a food preservation tray that looks very powerful. This design has been used in the past. The sealing of stored silver jewelry. prevents it from. contacting the air,. which can slow down oxidation. The same concept can be applied to food. to extend the shelf life. The tray is flat. and can be stacked after use. It seems super convenient.

, but in actual use,. it is not so consistent at all. What's going on? We put in a small amount of clams. but the lid couldn't be closed. We originally wanted to try to see if we could use the reverse lid to see. if it worked. It turned. out that the amount of clams that this preservation tray can hold is a bit small. If. it doesn't work,. let's try it with chicken wings and vegetables. The. chicken wings can barely cover. the vegetables. If they are scattered all around,. the lid will not close. . You have to concentrate the vegetables in the middle. But this amount is only two or three bites. , which is not enough. Let’s stack them. again to see if. the plates are not stable and will wobble. Akira’s. summary: This plastic wrap tray. can’t be covered. if there are too many things. Although it can be stacked. , it is very unstable and prone to collapse. The plastic wrap in the middle. is really only a thin piece. If it is wrapped with sharp objects such as bones,. it may be punctured. It turns out that this tray can only be used as a food preparation tray, which. is really surprising. The fourth one is this. hand-pressed garlic cutter. I believe many people have seen this advertisement. and can cut minced garlic by taking a photo. However, the actual experience after using it. is absolutely superb. I don’t recommend. it. This is really a thing that is not only useless. but also a waste of time. The knife used for mincing is a stainless steel piece,. not a knife. , which reduces the worry of scratches. The partition in the middle of the knife mold is super easy to fall off. in actual use. Look at me, pat, pat, pat, pat. , huh? Why are the garlic cloves getting less and less. when I open the lid and see that.

they are all stuck on the knife mold and I. have to use chopsticks to pick them out for a long time? It really pissed me. off . Later, some netizens said that we used it wrong. , so we followed the netizen's suggestion. and installed the partitions in reverse. , but it was completely If it gets stuck,. it will fall out. if you are not careful. Actually, try patting the garlic again. Last time, netizens said that we patted too slowly and with too little. force. Listen, this time we tried our best to pat the garlic quickly and hard,. but the garlic was patted more and more. The less. I come to open it and take a look,. the garlic is still stuck on the mold. The only praiseworthy thing. is that the reverse plate. prevents us from using chopsticks to pick out the garlic for a long time. If your purpose is to mince the garlic, it is. still recommended. If you want to buy other garlic cutters,. don’t waste your money on this difficult-to-use and labor-intensive product. The fifth item is the vegetable curler. This seems to be a very simple thing . It is said that it can cut vegetables into spirals. It seems interesting. , but this is Is it really easy to cut. the cucumber made of plastic. ? First try it with a small cucumber. First cut one end flat. , rotate the core in the middle and insert it into the small cucumber. After it is fixed, you can start to rotate it. around and really start slicing. It ’s so cool. We continued to spin. and really cut it into spiral shapes. The finished product looked like springs. It was super cute. Next, we tried small potatoes. to see if they could turn into the kind of rotating potatoes sold at night markets. When we started to spin,. the potato slices broke immediately. It even spins idling. If you want to cut the potato,. you have to press the blade with your hand to cut. But this is not only difficult to cut. , but also may accidentally cut your hand.

In the end, the editors agreed that. this thing is an interesting little toy,. some are softer and. not easy to cut. Such wide food. should be able to be successfully cut into spirals. The price is not expensive. People with fresh pictures can buy it and play with it. , but usually they should be put away after playing with it once. . After all , there is no point. in cutting food into spirals. . Sixth They are all kitchen supplies,. shrimp peelers. This thing has been touted in Facebook ads and Shopee. It is so amazing. Now it has even released version 2.0. and is directly made of stainless steel. It is no longer a plastic product. If you love to eat shrimp. but hate peeling it, People who like shrimp shells. should be careful not to buy this thing. The first thing I want to complain about. is that when using this product,. you must also encounter the important point of the shrimp. First, peel off the shrimp head. and insert the long clip into the shrimp shell and shrimp. middle of meat. The raw shrimps are a bit soft and difficult. to insert and it takes a while to align. , and because of the thickness of the clip,. it is impossible to insert them all the way. Although the meat and shell are separated after pressing,. there is no way to completely separate them. You have to repeat the action twice to really peel them off. Moreover, the peeled shrimp meat was a bit rotten and. my appetite was reduced by half. I tried it with mature shrimp. because the meat is harder. and more difficult to handle. The shrimp meat was also rotten when inserted. It was really ugly . It also. smelled like shrimp on my hands. It was worse. Peeling shrimps by hand. is more convenient, fast and beautiful. I really advise you not to buy this kind of product randomly. The seventh item: Non-stick snacks.

The product with the most. lazy tongs looks a bit like a child. When learning. how to use chopsticks, use your fingers like this. It’s different from how. I usually hold chopsticks. . I fastened it on the ring and used my fingers to pick up the biscuits. When I. actually picked up the biscuits, I saw. that it was quite smooth at first. , but later I found that the tongs would become crooked. If. it crooked, I couldn’t pick up the biscuits. . And if It’s actually very difficult to pick it up accurately. without looking at the clip. , so you lose the point of eating snacks while watching dramas. Also,. when you’re about to finish the biscuits,. you have to put your hand into the bag. and you’ll hit the oil stains in the bag. It feels like using this The clip is a bit redundant. Change the angle. If you want to. enjoy eating snacks and sucking. your fingers,. don’t buy it blindly. It is versatile. . I believe many people have bought this hanger. It. can be hung horizontally. or rotated straight, which. can save a lot of money in the wardrobe. Let’s see how the space. is actually used. When. the clothes are hung horizontally, they immediately become unbalanced and. sway left and right. It’s not OK at all. Let’s try to hang the clothes. and try to hang them straight like the advertisement to save space. Although it is 80% similar , we only know. this after actually using it. The hanging method makes it easy for clothes to be squeezed with other items. Not only is it difficult to access. the cabinet , it cannot be used properly. if it is not high enough. Moreover,. most of the clothes you want to hang are coats or shirts and other. clothes that you do not want to squeeze. If you use this It might be suitable to. hang children's clothes or pet clothes. This iron ring that looks like mosquito coils. is actually a clothes drying rack.

Look at the photo. . Putting the quilt in like this to dry. can save a lot of space. Let's try it first. . Just put the big towel in a spiral shape. People are a bit impatient,. let alone drying sheets or thick cotton quilts. The washed sheets are relatively heavy. and put on the clothes drying rack. The whole thing is crooked. and seems to fall off at any time. . And if the weather is bad, the. middle part will If you don't dry it completely,. the accumulated moisture. will make the quilt smell musty. It is very troublesome to wash it again. It is recommended to use it to dry smaller cloth products such as towels. or to use it with clips. to dry small clothes such as socks and handkerchiefs. OK. , but if you want to buy sheets to dry,. please cancel the order quickly. and don't waste money. Finally. , I will teach you a super simple way to dry sheets. Take. out the ordinary clothes hanger you have at home. , grab one side of the sheet, pass it. through the middle of the clothes hanger and put it. on the clothes hanger. There is no need to use clips on it. , just put it on like drying clothes. Spread the sheets on both sides and. spread them over a large area to dry quickly. This is a secret trick taught by the laundry owner. Why not learn it quickly? Today I have summarized the 9 most likely things for you. Are there any products. that you are attracted to buy but are really amazing. that you have already bought. next year? Wroga will still help you check. the practical use. of the products. please leave a message or send a private message. to follow IG to see the secrets. Join the community and there are various experts to help you.
